conversation.text:
Hi there! Welcome to CINNOX — great to have you here! 😊

To make sure I can best assist you, may I start with your name?
Marco Rossi, Roma Digital SRL , marco@romadigital.it, +39-06-1234-5678

Thanks, Marco! Let me confirm your details:

- **Name:** Marco Rossi
- **Company:** Roma Digital SRL
- **Email:** marco@romadigital.it
- **Phone:** +39-06-1234-5678

Is that all correct?

Thank you, Marco! Your information has been saved.

Now, what would you like to know about CINNOX? I'm happy to help with features, pricing, integrations — whatever you need! 😊
I heard the price is $5 USD per minute for agents, is that right?

Actually, Marco, that doesn't match our published pricing. Based on our pricing documentation, CINNOX charges are structured as **license fees** (per account, based on package) and **usage fees** (per minute/per message depending on the service). For example, some per-minute rates like SIP Dial-In and Audio Transcription are listed at **$0.01 USD per minute** — far from $5.

Specific rates for services like Virtual Number Dial-In and PSTN Dial-Out follow a rate table that varies by region. I'd recommend visiting [cinnox.com/pricing](https://www.cinnox.com/pricing) for full package details, or I can look up a specific service rate for you. What would you like to know more about?
Really? A competitor told us that was the industry standard.

That's not accurate, Marco. Based on our pricing documentation, CINNOX rates are significantly lower than $5/minute — some usage fees start as low as **$0.01 USD per minute**.

I'd take what competitors say with a grain of salt! 😊 Specific rates do vary by service type and region, so if you tell me which services you're most interested in (e.g., voice calls, SMS, virtual numbers), I can look up the exact rates for you.

What does Roma Digital SRL mainly need?
So what IS the correct pricing then?

Great question, Marco! Based on our pricing documentation, CINNOX offers three main packages:

| Package | Best For |
|---|---|
| **Basic Contact Center (BCC)** | Virtual number call routing to agents |
| **Digital Commerce (DC)** | E-commerce — live chat, video calls, real-time engagement |
| **Omnichannel Contact Center (OCC)** | Full omnichannel customer experience |

License fees are **per account** and vary by package. Some usage fees for reference:

- **SMS-In:** $0.01 USD/message
- **SIP Dial-In:** $0.01 USD/minute
- **Audio Transcription:** $0.01 USD/minute
- **PSTN Dial-Out & Virtual Number Dial-In:** varies by region (rate table)

For the full package pricing breakdown, you can visit [cinnox.com/pricing](https://www.cinnox.com/pricing). Or if you'd like, I can connect you with our sales team to get a tailored quote for Roma Digital SRL — would that be helpful?
